title: Sticky Sidebar Layout
description:
Write CSS to create a **two-column layout** where the sidebar sticks to the top of the viewport as the main content scrolls.

### Visual Target

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Header                                   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  Sidebar   в”Ӯ  Main Content               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (sticky)  в”Ӯ  (scrollable)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  ...                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  ...                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  ...                        в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Footer                                   в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Requirements

- `.layout` uses CSS Grid with two columns: sidebar `16rem` wide, main `1fr`
- `.layout__sidebar` uses `position: sticky` with `top: 0`
- `.layout__sidebar` should have `align-self: start` so it doesn't stretch to the full column height
- Sidebar max-height is `100vh` with `overflow-y: auto`
- `.layout__header` and `.layout__footer` span the full width (both columns)
- Header has background `#1f2937`, white text, `1rem` padding
- Footer has background `#f3f4f6`, `1rem` padding
- Sidebar has background `#f9fafb`, `1.5rem` padding, right border `1px solid #e5e7eb`
- Main area has `2rem` padding

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Layout grid | `layout` |
| Header | `header` |
| Sidebar | `sidebar` |
| Main area | `main` |
| Footer | `footer` |
constraints:
- Only edit styles.css
- Use CSS Grid for the overall layout
- Use position: sticky for the sidebar (not fixed)
- Do not use JavaScript for scroll behaviour
hints: Use grid-template-columns: 16rem 1fr on .layout and let header/footer span both columns with grid-column: 1 / -1.
The key to sticky sidebar is: position: sticky, top: 0, and align-self: start. Without align-self: start the element stretches to fill the grid cell and sticky won't work.
Set max-height: 100vh and overflow-y: auto on the sidebar so it scrolls internally if its content is tall.
